_comment: burn is an action, look is an action, they are handled with the game engine specially, if not in any action, the game engine will look for a varible and compare the value their is alist called burt that has values of the room, when the game engine looks here and sees burt the true means it will print out that value if the place is in the burt list. look is an automatic action that prints out the text dependicies can change this however

room.title: Everywhere in Time and space
room.description: you look around, left and right all doors... LockedYou see a pedistal with holes for two stones three doors are unlocked, a door catches your intrest, it says 'home'is this your way home?

rock.0: the room is filled with doors, everwhere...to everwhere...time bends to your knees
rock.1: the room doors look like they are more welcoming...the rock must have helped

medievel-park.title: Ancient lands belonging to the kings and witches
medievel-park.description: you wake up where is this place?you watch reads '3/24/1426 6am pts' 'wow!'the time machine took youto the mediveal ages, this ought to be intresting...

gotowd.burn: the park starts smoking...BOOMfire burst everywhere, nobody is their to save it or do anything...CRACKA book is reveled from the trunk of a fallen tree. Hours pass by as the forest burns...

burnt: the park is filled with a blanket of ash, it looks lifeless, will anybody ever establish this as their home again?
a beutiful parkbirds sign, squirrels run up and down trees. It seems like a greate place to stay, but you should be careful with fire here...
